name: obsidian-brain-os
description: A project-aware Obsidian 'second brain' operating system for Claude Code: PARA vault, session intake/capture hooks, semantic search (qmd), code-architecture graphs (graphify), and a pitch-canvas generator.

plugins.name: brain-os
plugins.description: Turn Obsidian + Claude Code into a self-maintaining knowledge base: PARA structure, project-aware session start, auto session capture, nightly tidy + semantic re-index, and presentation canvases.
